title: Fix Alembic migration constraint error
description: Fix Alembic migration error during `alembic upgrade head`: `cannot drop constraint module_devices_serial_key on table module_devices because other objects depend on it. DETAIL: constraint device_complectations_device_serial_fkey on table device_complectations depends on index module_devices_serial_key`. The failing migration script is `20260301_1437-f26f5022506a_blog_rename_reading_time.py`. Update the migration script to properly handle or drop/recreate the foreign key dependencies so the upgrade succeeds.
acceptance_criteria: alembic upgrade head completes without constraint errors
Foreign key constraints between module_devices and device_complectations remain consistent
